step1.title: Unapendelea kuunda akaunti ya aina gani?
step1.description: Chagua aina ya akaunti yako kuifanyia binafsi uzoefu wako.
step1.individual_desc: Tusaidie kukutambua wewe ni nani ndani ya mfumo wa usimamizi wa utafiti na uvumbuzi.
step1.institution_desc: Chagua aina inayofafanua vyema shirika lako kuu.
step1.no_institutions_found: Hakuna mashirika yaliyopatikana. Unaweza kuendelea na kile ulichokuchapisha.

education_levels.Early-Career Researcher / Research manag: Early-Career Researcher / Research management professional (0 – 5 years post-qualification)
education_levels.Mid-Career Researcher / Research managem: Mid-Career Researcher / Research management professional (6 – 15 years)
education_levels.Senior Researcher / Research management: Senior Researcher / Research management professional (16+ years)

step2.title: Masomo ya Maslahi
step2.min_required: Tafadhali chagua angalau 3 maslahi ili kuendelea

step3.title: Elimu na Kazi
step3.description: Tusaidie kuelewa historia yako ili kutoa fursa za kisayansi zinazokubaliana zaidi.

step4.title: Una ORCID?
step4.description: ORCID hutoa kitambulisho cha kidijitali kinachodumu kinachokutofautisha kutoka kwa wasomi wengine.

step5.title: Uhusiano wa sasa
step5.description: Tutapendekeza washirika wa utafiti na wafadhili kulingana na uhusiano wako wa taasisi ya sasa.
